title: This is the first release of Lean Launcher.

features.title: Lean Launcher Features
items: Per-instance settings with RAM and JVM controls
Instance file manager with upload and drag/drop support
Theme system, language selection, and profile selection

features.title: Client Features
items: Multiple version targets and profile options
Ready for lightweight and customizable setups

features.title: macOS Enhancements
items: Dock, menu bar, and keychain now show 'Lean Launcher' instead of 'Electron'
Custom Lean Launcher icon visible in the Dock and app switcher
